all.en: Brightline Appliances is voluntarily recalling certain models of its electric kettles.
all.zh: Brightline 家電自主召回特定型號的電熱水壺。

all.en: The recall affects units sold between January and August of last year.
all.zh: 本次召回影響去年一月至八月間售出的產品。

all.en: Approximately 78,000 units distributed across North America are involved.
all.zh: 約有七萬八千台分布於北美各地的產品涉及在內。

all.en: The affected models are EK210, EK215, and EK220 series kettles.
all.zh: 受影響的型號為 EK210、EK215 及 EK220 系列電熱水壺。

all.en: Model and serial numbers can be found on the base of each unit.
all.zh: 型號與序號可於每台機器的底部找到。

all.en: An internal investigation identified a potential defect in the heating element seal.
all.zh: 內部調查發現加熱元件密封處可能存在缺陷。

all.en: Under certain conditions, the seal may fail and allow water to contact wiring.
all.zh: 在特定情況下，密封可能失效，使水與電線接觸。

all.en: This poses a risk of electric shock or fire hazard to consumers.
all.zh: 此可能對消費者造成觸電或火災的風險。

all.en: The company has received nine reports of overheating and one minor injury.
all.zh: 公司已接獲九件過熱通報及一件輕微傷害案例。

all.en: Out of caution, all customers are urged to stop using the products immediately.
all.zh: 出於審慎考量，敦請所有顧客立即停止使用此產品。

all.en: Please unplug the kettle and place it in a safe, dry location.
all.zh: 請拔除電熱水壺電源並放置於安全、乾燥處。

all.en: Brightline will provide a full refund or a free replacement of a newer model.
all.zh: Brightline 將提供全額退款或免費更換為較新型號。

all.en: Customers may register their claim through the official recall website.
all.zh: 顧客可透過官方召回網站登記申請。

all.en: The website address is www.brightline-recall.com and is available 24 hours daily.
all.zh: 網址為 www.brightline-recall.com，全天二十四小時開放。

all.en: A toll-free hotline is also available at 1-800-555-0322 during business hours.
all.zh: 亦提供免付費專線 1-800-555-0322，於營業時間內服務。

all.en: Customers will receive prepaid return labels within five business days of registration.
all.zh: 顧客將於登記後五個工作日內收到預付運費的回收標籤。

all.en: No charge will be applied for shipping, processing, or refund issuance.
all.zh: 運費、處理及退款發放均不另收取任何費用。

all.en: Refunds are typically credited within 14 business days of product receipt.
all.zh: 退款通常於收到產品後十四個工作天內入帳。

all.en: Retailers have been instructed to remove affected units from store shelves.
all.zh: 已通知零售商將受影響商品自貨架上撤下。

all.en: All in-transit shipments have been intercepted and rerouted for inspection.
all.zh: 所有運送中的貨物已被攔截並改道送檢。

all.en: Brightline is working with safety regulators to ensure full transparency.
all.zh: Brightline 正與安全主管機關合作以確保完全透明。

all.en: We deeply regret the inconvenience this recall may cause our valued customers.
all.zh: 我們對此次召回造成尊貴顧客的不便深感抱歉。

all.en: Consumer safety remains our highest priority in everything we manufacture.
all.zh: 消費者安全始終是我們在所有製造活動中的最高優先。

all.en: Updates on the recall will be posted regularly on our official channels.
all.zh: 本次召回的最新進度將定期於官方管道更新發布。

all.en: Brightline has appointed an independent engineering firm to verify the root cause analysis.
all.zh: Brightline 已委任獨立工程顧問公司驗證根本原因分析。

all.en: Production at the affected manufacturing line has been paused pending corrective measures.
all.zh: 受影響的生產線已暫停運作，待採行矯正措施後復工。

all.en: Enhanced inspection protocols will be added before the line resumes full operation.
all.zh: 復線全面運作前將增加加強型檢驗程序。

all.en: All future kettle models will undergo expanded thermal and seal integrity testing.
all.zh: 所有未來電熱水壺型號將接受擴大的熱性能與密封完整性測試。

all.en: The company will publish a final investigation report within sixty days of completion.
all.zh: 公司將於調查結束後六十日內公布最終調查報告。

all.en: Customers who registered warranty information will be contacted individually by email.
all.zh: 已登記保固資訊的顧客將另以電子郵件個別聯繫。

all.en: Brightline encourages affected consumers to share the recall notice with friends and family.
all.zh: Brightline 鼓勵受影響的消費者將此召回公告分享給親友。

all.en: Media inquiries should be directed to our corporate communications office in Chicago.
all.zh: 媒體詢問請洽本公司位於芝加哥的企業傳播辦公室。

all.en: We sincerely thank our customers for their patience and continued trust in our brand.
all.zh: 由衷感謝顧客的耐心以及對本品牌持續的信任。

all.en: Brightline remains committed to delivering safe, reliable, and innovative home appliances.
all.zh: Brightline 仍致力於提供安全、可靠且創新的家用電器產品。

all.en: Replacement units will be shipped from the regional distribution center within seven business days.
all.zh: 替換品將於七個工作日內由區域配送中心出貨。

all.en: Each replacement kettle will arrive with an updated user manual and warranty card.
all.zh: 每台替換熱水壺隨附更新版使用手冊及保固卡。

all.en: Original purchase receipts are not required to participate in this recall program.
all.zh: 參加本召回計畫無須提供原始購買收據。

all.en: Authorized service centers can also accept affected units in person without prior appointment.
all.zh: 授權服務中心亦可現場受理受影響商品，無須事先預約。

all.en: Online retailers have updated their listings to display the recall notice prominently.
all.zh: 線上零售商已更新商品頁面以醒目顯示召回公告。

all.en: Brightline will absorb all costs associated with the recall, including disposal and freight.
all.zh: Brightline 將承擔召回相關全部成本，包含廢棄處理與運費。

all.en: Customer service capacity has been doubled to handle the expected volume of inquiries.
all.zh: 客戶服務人力已加倍以因應預期增加的查詢量。

all.en: Independent consumer advocacy groups have been briefed in advance of this announcement.
all.zh: 本公告發布前已先向獨立消費者倡議團體做簡報。

all.en: A multilingual support team is available for customers in Spanish, French, and Mandarin.
all.zh: 提供西班牙語、法語及國語的多語支援團隊，服務相關顧客。

all.en: Brightline pledges to share lessons learned across the industry to advance product safety.
all.zh: Brightline 承諾將經驗教訓分享給業界以促進產品安全。

all.en: My aunt called me in panic last night because she had been using one of these kettles every morning.
all.zh: 我阿姨昨晚緊張地打給我，因為她每天早上都在用其中一款熱水壺。

all.en: Honestly, the registration form online took me less than four minutes to complete on my phone.
all.zh: 說真的，線上登記表單我用手機填寫不到四分鐘就完成了。

all.en: If your kettle is sitting unused on the counter, just unplug it tonight before bed to be safe.
all.zh: 若您的熱水壺還閒置在流理台上，今晚睡前先把插頭拔掉以策安全。

all.en: A neighbor mentioned that her replacement model boils water noticeably faster than the original one.
all.zh: 一位鄰居提到，她拿到的替換款燒開水的速度明顯比原本那台快。

all.en: Please keep the original box if you still have it, although it really is not required for the refund.
all.zh: 若原本的紙箱還在，麻煩您留著，雖然退款其實並不要求一定要附上。

all.en: Our customer service line was unusually busy on Monday morning, so try calling on a Tuesday afternoon.
all.zh: 週一上午客服專線異常繁忙，建議您改在週二下午撥打。

all.en: I told my mother to take a photo of the model number on the bottom before packing it up.
all.zh: 我請媽媽在打包之前先拍下底部的型號照片。

all.en: It made me sad to see our flagship product cause inconvenience to so many trusting families.
all.zh: 看到我們的旗艦產品造成這麼多信任我們的家庭困擾，我心裡其實很難過。

all.en: Looking back, our team's open communication during the recall actually strengthened brand loyalty over time.
all.zh: 回頭看，召回期間我們團隊的公開溝通，長遠而言反而強化了品牌的忠誠度。

all.en: Thank you again for trusting us to make this right; please reach out if anything still feels unresolved.
all.zh: 再次感謝您信任我們把事情做對；若有任何尚未解決的疑慮，請隨時與我們聯繫。
